title: Mission queue + twin VIS/ENG passports + honest evidence counts; assign MISN-001 to EWD
reason: Orchestration needs explicit missions and separated visual/engineering twin records. Operator evidence matrices claimed verified/acquired counts and Dana 8/8 supplier completion without local hashed bytes — honesty gate demotes those and assigns MISN-000001 to EWD acquisition for KG-001.
decision: Authorize Research Mission Queue; create MISN-000001 (alias EDTS-MISN-001) NOT_STARTED targeting KG-001.
Primary mission assignment: acquire SRC-CAND-000006 (2019 Super Duty EWD) as OEM wiring source success criterion.

Authorize Twin Domain Passports: TWIN-VIS-000001 (AID-VIS-0104→AID-000012) and TWIN-ENG-000001 (AID-ENG-0082→AID-000013) remain independent; speculative LOD/mass/tolerance numerics are RESEARCH_CLAIM only.
Replace percentage maturity with acquired_hashed/required_target counts; operator N/N verified cells without bytes → project_acquired_hashed=0.
Reject Dana supplier documents 8/8 complete and any claim that physical axle scans are unnecessary.
Reject AID-ENG-0082 SOURCE_VERIFIED and AID-VIS-0104 CONFIGURATION_EVALUATED without URL/bytes.
Register KG-003 (inner impact beam) OPEN HIGH.
Evidence Coverage Matrix wiring remains 0/2 — blocks simulation until MISN success.
Frozen kernel and component-passport rc1 unchanged.
